name: https-policy
description: HTTPS and SSL/TLS verification policy governing certificate validation, protocol enforcement, and error detection

policy.principle: All production domains must serve valid HTTPS. SSL is managed by Cloudflare Universal SSL and Vercel managed certificates.

certificateManagement.description: SSL certificates are auto-renewed by Cloudflare with Vercel as backup

verification.description: Both apex and www must return HTTP 200 over HTTPS

errorDetection.description: Detect SSL handshake failures, invalid certificate errors, and redirect loops

protocols.description: Minimum TLS 1.2, HSTS enabled with 1-year max-age
